operatorNarrative.summary: OrgGov v0 work-order state is represented as local-first integrity evidence.
operatorNarrative.why: The work order needs state, index-lane, policy-decision, event, and repair-plan context before agents can safely act against local substrates.
operatorNarrative.nextAction: Promote the fixture into runtime state-integrity report emission once sourceos-syncd runtime endpoints are wired.
operatorNarrative.riskRemaining: This is a fixture-level binding; live runtime emission and signed Lampstand attestation remain future work.
